fact: Market Intel News Reader project was initiated with a PRD for an iPhone-friendly PWA news workflow.

Market Intel News Reader MVP reached complete status with UX-critical improvements: dark mode, relative publication timestamps, source badges, favorites persistence, correct newest-first sorting, and UTC timestamp normalization.
News Reader app architecture changed: Now loads RSS + Reddit data directly from market-intel/data/ (rss_alerts.json + reddit_alerts.json) — no duplicate feed generation needed, 250 items combined
